objective: Create the Tiny Brief Intake fixture source snapshot and PRD element inventory path.
implemented_capabilities: Exact byte-for-byte source PRD snapshot copied from the approved P2 vertical slice PRD.
Source snapshot manifest validation that reports malformed payloads, missing paths, drift, hash format, hash mismatch, and byte-size mismatch.
Artifact wrapper metadata for schema payload keys, source refs, upstream artifact refs, upstream hashes, validator refs, promotion state, and invalidation inputs.
PRD element inventory records covering the approved P2 element universe with source-section hash bindings.
Deductive derived-element records for required failure and missing-input copy without adding product capability.
Inductive auxiliary derived elements are blocked from canonical eligibility without Human Gate approval.
Open product expansion gap records for secondary page, multi-user workflow, and generated live product candidates, all blocked behind Human Gate.
Product expansion gap validation now rejects malformed gap type, status, source_refs, blocked_artifacts, and missing resolved decision refs.
P2 tests for source hash binding, inventory coverage, deductive completion, no product expansion, malformed payloads, malformed product gaps, and upstream hash conservation.

repair_findings_fixed.gap: Scope report listed repository/tests/p2/conftest.py even though P2-IMPL-01 did not authorize that write path.
repair_findings_fixed.fix: Deleted the conftest file and removed it from implemented/scope records; tests rely on explicit PYTHONPATH.

repair_findings_fixed.gap: Product expansion gap validator allowed unknown gap_type/status and empty source_refs, weakening no-expansion verification.
repair_findings_fixed.fix: Added enum, source_refs, blocked_artifacts, and resolved decision_ref checks with negative tests.

repair_findings_fixed.gap: Source snapshot validator could receive non-manifest objects and had weak hash-format diagnostics.
repair_findings_fixed.fix: Added malformed object handling, required field checks, hash-format checks, and negative tests.

deferred_due_scope.item: Inference record artifact existence for derived failure-copy decisions
deferred_due_scope.reason: P2-IMPL-01 is limited to source freeze and PRD element inventory path. P2-IMPL-02 owns inference_records.json and should bind the reserved inference_refs before downstream canonical compilation consumes them.
